findings.description: The candidate rules completely omitted the mandatory requirements for locked header/footer components (logo, copyright, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI) and the strict negative constraint forbidding their reproduction within body sections.

payload.description: Never reproduce the Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, or ISI in body sections, as they must reside exclusively within the locked header/footer components.

findings.description: The rule for clinical claims footnotes misses the governance reference section identifier (§1.2) mentioned in the source unit.
